2---
title: "CDL Dashboard"
date: "2025-02-02"
categories: [GitHub, Vercel, Claude Code]
---

<style>
/* ── CDL Dashboard brand colors ── */
/* Red: #e00000  |  Dark: #0f172a  |  Slate: #1e293b  |  White: #FFFFFF */

.cdl-hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 3rem 2rem 2.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 50%, #e00000 100%);
  border-radius: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.3);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.cdl-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: -30%;
  right: -8%;
  width: 350px;
  height: 350px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.cdl-hero h1 {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.cdl-hero p {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.cdl-hero .cdl-icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: #e00000;
  border-radius: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(224, 0, 0, 0.3);
}

.cdl-section {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e8e0e0;
  border-left: 4px solid #e00000;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.cdl-section h3 {
  color: #0f172a;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.cdl-section li {
  color: #333;
}

.cdl-highlight {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #FDF0F0;
  color: #e00000;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
</style>

::: {.cdl-hero}

<div class="cdl-icon">
  <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white">
    <path d="M20 8h-3V4H3c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v11h2c0 1.66 1.34 3 3 3s3-1.34 3-3h6c0 1.66 1.34 3 3 3s3-1.34 3-3h2v-5l-3-4zM6 18.5c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zm13.5-9l1.96 2.5H17V9.5h2.5zm-1.5 9c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5z"/>
  </svg>
</div>

# CDL Dashboard

<p>Student portal for tracking CDL training progress, documents, and scores</p>

:::

## Live Product Demo

<div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3 my-4">
  <!-- Open App button -->
  <a class="btn btn-primary d-inline-flex align-items-center"
     href="https://cdl-dashboard.vercel.app/"
     target="_blank" rel="noopener"
     aria-label="Open live app">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-window-restore me-2" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    Open App in New Tab
  </a>

  <!-- GitHub Source button -->
  <a class="btn btn-outline-dark d-inline-flex align-items-center"
     href="https://github.com/adrianfcv/cdl-dashboard"
     target="_blank" rel="noopener"
     aria-label="Open GitHub source">
    <i class="fa-brands fa-github me-2" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    View Source on GitHub
  </a>
</div>

<iframe src="https://cdl-dashboard.vercel.app/"
        style="width:100%; height:900px; border:none; border-radius:12px;"
        allowfullscreen>
</iframe>

## Overview

This project involved using Claude Code to develop a full student dashboard for The Trucking School. The CDL Dashboard provides students with a centralized portal to track their CDL training progress, view test scores, access certificates, and manage account settings.

The primary purpose of this app is to:

- Give students real-time visibility into their training progress across CDL classes
- Provide a clean, professional interface for viewing test scores and earned certificates
- Streamline the student experience with a modern, responsive dashboard

::: {.cdl-section}

### The Problem

CDL training programs often lack a digital student experience. Students have limited visibility into their progress, scores, and certification status, relying on phone calls or in-person visits to get updates. This creates friction for both students and administrators.

:::

::: {.cdl-section}

### The Solution

The CDL Dashboard addresses this gap with a purpose-built student portal featuring:

- <span class="cdl-highlight">Dashboard Home</span> — Welcome overview with key stats, training progress, and recent activity
- <span class="cdl-highlight">Profile</span> — Student information, enrollment details, and class history
- <span class="cdl-highlight">Documents</span> — Earned certificates with download access and in-progress tracking
- <span class="cdl-highlight">Training</span> — Module-by-module progress with completion status and scores
- <span class="cdl-highlight">Testing</span> — Complete score history with pass/fail indicators and averages
- <span class="cdl-highlight">Settings</span> — Notification preferences, appearance options, and account management

:::

::: {.cdl-section}

### Technical Details

**Framework/Stack:** Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

**Deployment:** Vercel (production) + GitHub (source control)

**Design:** Dark theme with glassmorphism cards, red accent branding, responsive sidebar layout, staggered animations

**Tools Used:**

- Claude Code — AI-assisted development for building components, pages, and data models
- Vercel — Production deployment and hosting
- GitHub — Version control and source code management

:::

## Product Requirements Document

The CDL Dashboard was built from a detailed implementation plan that specified:

- **6 dashboard pages** with consistent navigation and design language
- **Mock data** for a sample student (John Martinez) with Class A (complete, 87%) and Class B (in progress, 67%)
- **Reusable components** including StatCard, ProgressBar, ScoreBadge, CertificateCard, and ActivityItem
- **Responsive design** with a collapsible sidebar for mobile and a sticky header
- **Dark glassmorphism theme** matching The Trucking School branding (slate-900 background, #e00000 red accent, Lexend Deca font)

---

**Role:** Founder & Developer | **Stack:** Next.js + Tailwind CSS | **Live App:** [cdl-dashboard.vercel.app](https://cdl-dashboard.vercel.app){target="_blank"}
